Matt McInerney, Pablo Impallari, Rodrigo Fuenzalida

Reserved Font Name: Raleway

---

License

This Font Software is licensed under the SIL Open Font License, Version 1.1.

The full license text is included below.
You can also read the official license and FAQ here:

https://scripts.sil.org/OFL

---

SIL OPEN FONT LICENSE

Version 1.1 — 26 February 2007

---

Preamble

The goals of the Open Font License (OFL) are to:

- Encourage worldwide collaborative font development
- Support font creation efforts in academic and linguistic communities
- Provide a free and open framework for sharing and improving fonts

The OFL allows the fonts to be:

- Used
- Studied
- Modified
- Redistributed

as long as they are not sold by themselves.

Fonts may be bundled, embedded, redistributed, and sold as part of software, provided that reserved font names are not used by derivative works.

Derivative versions must remain under this same license.

---

Definitions

Font Software
The collection of files released under this license, including source files, build scripts, and documentation.

Reserved Font Name
Names declared as reserved by the copyright holders.

Original Version
The official release distributed by the copyright holders.

Modified Version
Any derivative version created by modifying, deleting, adding, or porting parts of the original software.

Author
Any designer, developer, engineer, or contributor involved in creating the font software.

---

Permission and Conditions

Permission is granted free of charge to any person obtaining a copy of the Font Software to:

- Use
- Study
- Copy
- Merge
- Embed
- Modify
- Redistribute

subject to the following conditions:

1. The Font Software may not be sold by itself.

2. Modified or original versions may be bundled or distributed with software, provided the copyright notice and license are included.

3. Modified versions may not use the Reserved Font Name unless written permission is granted.

4. The names of the copyright holders or authors may not be used to promote derivative versions without permission.

5. The font software must remain under the SIL Open Font License and cannot be relicensed under another license.

---

Termination

This license becomes null and void if any of the above conditions are violated.

---

Disclaimer

THE FONT SOFTWARE IS PROVIDED "AS IS", WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY KIND, EXPRESS OR IMPLIED.

This includes, but is not limited to:

- Merchantability
- Fitness for a particular purpose
- Non-infringement of intellectual property rights

In no event shall the copyright holders be liable for any claim, damages, or other liability arising from the use of the Font Software.
